channel.title: Bloomberg Green Global
channel.description: Últimos artigos de Bloomberg Green Global

item.title: Huawei's $11 Billion Clean Energy Empire Is Opening New Markets
item.description: Best known for telecoms infrastructure, the Chinese powerhouse has quietly become part of the backbone of the global energy transition.
item.dc:creator: Coco Liu, Fabiano Maisonnave, Dong Cao, Haze Fan

item.title: New York, US Northeast Will See Temperatures Soar This Week
item.description: New York City and the Northeast will see temperatures surge this week as another wave of sultry weather shifts across the eastern US and southern Canada.
item.dc:creator: Brian K Sullivan, John Ainger

item.title: Sunrun Offers Solar Users Hundreds Per Month in Compute Program
item.description: Sunrun Inc. is piloting a program aimed at enabling customers to earn hundreds of dollars per month that would use electricity from rooftop solar and battery installations to power home-computing systems for AI, according to Chief Executive Officer Mary Powell.
item.dc:creator: Will Wade, Mark Chediak

item.title: EU Nations to Discuss Impact of Methane Rules on Energy Security
item.description: European Union member states will this week debate the impact of the bloc’s controversial methane-emissions rules for importers on the region’s energy security.
item.dc:creator: Ewa Krukowska

item.title: Funding Cuts Threaten World’s Champion For Cutting Heat Deaths
item.description: Maricopa County has long been a leader and testing ground for heat-death prevention policies.
item.dc:creator: Zahra Hirji, Laura Millan, Joe Wertz, Ana Campoy

item.title: Europe Heat Wave Strains Power Grids, Hospitals and Firefighters
item.description: France is rushing air conditioners to hospitals as drought, wildfires and extreme heat grip Europe.
item.dc:creator: Joe Wertz, Brian K Sullivan, Nayla Razzouk

item.title: Climate Tech Sees Record-High Deals as Power Demand Fuels Market Appetite
item.description: The recovery in IPOs and acquisitions may help unlock fresh venture capital for the sector, experts say.
item.dc:creator: Coco Liu

item.title: Heat Wave Dries Up German Rhine Chokepoint to Strain Fuel Supply
item.description: Water levels at a key waypoint on the Rhine River have fallen to the lowest for the time of year in decades as Europe struggles with intense heat waves, limiting fuel flows into southern Germany and Switzerland.
item.dc:creator: Rachel Graham

item.title: Heat Waves May Have Led to Over 2,700 Deaths in England and Wales
item.description: This summer’s heat waves may have already resulted in more than 2,700 deaths in England and Wales.
item.dc:creator: Laura Millan, Joe Wertz

item.title: Europe Battles Growing Wildfires After Relentless Heat
item.description: Wildfires are breaking out across Europe after three heat waves and weeks of low rainfall left much of the continent dangerously dry, with crews battling blazes south of Paris and in the UK, while Spain reels from one of its deadliest wildfires.
item.dc:creator: Joe Wertz, William Horobin
